---
title: "Measurement, Experimentation & Causal Inference"
subtitle: "Advanced Methods Workshop"
---

This workshop is a three-module sequence designed for researchers in management and social science. Each module combines conceptual foundations with hands-on R tutorials and interactive simulations.

The workshop is built around a core question that runs through all three modules: **how do we draw valid inferences from data?** Measurement shapes what we can even ask. Hypothesis testing governs what counts as evidence. Causal reasoning determines what we can conclude.

---

## Modules

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Module 1: Measurement

When does your scale measure what you think it measures — and when does it measure something else entirely?

[Module 1 →](module-1/intro.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

**Sections**

- [Case 1: Discriminant Validity](module-1/case1.qmd)
- [Case 2: Omitted Variable Bias](module-1/case2.qmd)
- [Case 3: Measurement Invariance](module-1/case3.qmd)
- [Case 4: Latent Subgroups](module-1/case4.qmd)
- [Cases 5 & 6: Outliers and Systematic Error](module-1/case5.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Module 2: Hypothesis Testing

What does a p-value actually tell you? How does randomization create valid inference, and when does it fail?

[Module 2 →](module-2/intro.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

**Sections**

- [Part 1: What Does a P-value Mean?](module-2/part1.qmd)
- [Part 2: The Exclusion Restriction](module-2/part2.qmd)
- [Part 3: What Does Random Assignment Require?](module-2/part3.qmd)
- [Part 4: Experimental Design Strategies](module-2/part4.qmd)
- [Part 5: Design Solutions and Assignment Strategies](module-2/part5.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### Module 3: Causal Inference

When can we say that X *caused* Y? What methods go beyond randomized experiments, and what do they assume?

[Module 3 →](module-3/intro.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

**Sections**

- [Part 1: What Is a Causal Effect?](module-3/part1.qmd)
- [Part 2: Selection on Observables](module-3/part2.qmd)
- [Part 3: Regression Discontinuity](module-3/part3.qmd)
- [Part 4: Difference-in-Differences](module-3/part4.qmd)
- [Part 5: Mediation](module-3/part5.qmd)
:::

:::
